notes: Test timed events (Moby, Sting 3.0) + MVM Dome venue + Budapest Park recategorized as Venues. Run migration script first if DB still has category Events.
missingOrUncertain: Sting ticket prices vary by tier; entryFees use published on-sale reference only.
MVM Dome image uses Budapest arena placeholder until dedicated ImgBB asset is uploaded.

document.name: MVM Dome
document.shortDescription: Major indoor arena in southern Pest — concerts and arena shows with published ticket tiers.
document.longDescription:
MVM Dome (formerly Budapest Arena) is a large indoor venue in Újbuda used for international concert tours. Check the official promoter or venue listings for door times, seated and standing zones, and on-sale windows.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

hu.name: MVM Dome
hu.shortDescription: Nagy beltéri aréna dél-Pesten — koncertturnék és jegyek a hivatalos oldalon.
hu.longDescription:
Az MVM Dome (korábban Budapest Aréna) nagy beltéri helyszín Újbudán, nemzetközi koncertturnék számára. A kapunyitás és jegyárak a promoter oldalán.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

es.name: MVM Dome
es.shortDescription: Gran arena cubierta en el sur de Pest — giras y entradas en la web oficial.
es.longDescription:
MVM Dome es una gran sala cubierta en Újbuda para giras internacionales. Horarios de puerta y precios en el promotor.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

it.name: MVM Dome
it.shortDescription: Grande arena indoor a Pest sud — tour e biglietti sul sito ufficiale.
it.longDescription:
MVM Dome è una grande arena coperta a Újbuda per concerti internazionali. Orari e prezzi sul promoter.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

he.name: MVM Dome
he.shortDescription: אולם מקורה גדול בדרום פשט — הופעות וכרטיסים באתר הרשמי.
he.longDescription:
MVM Dome הוא אולם מקורה גדול ב-Újbuda להופעות בינלאומיות. שעות פתיחה ומחירים אצל המארגן.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

ar.name: MVM Dome
ar.shortDescription: ساحة داخلية كبيرة في جنوب بودابست — جولات وحفلات وتذاكر عبر الموقع الرسمي.
ar.longDescription:
MVM Dome ساحة مغطاة كبيرة في Újbuda للحفلات الدولية. أوقات الأبواب والأسعار لدى المنظم.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

document.title: Moby — live at Budapest Park
document.shortDescription: Moby returns to Budapest Park on Saturday 1 August 2026 — gates 18:00, electronic set on the island stage.
document.longDescription:
After 15 years, Moby plays an open-air show at Budapest Park (Hajógyári-sziget). The promoter lists gate opening at 18:00 on Saturday 1 August 2026. Buy tickets on budapestpark.hu; handling fees may apply online.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/index.php/en/events/moby-20260801

entryFees.label: General admission
entryFees.notes: See budapestpark.hu for current ticket tiers and fees

hu.title: Moby — élőben a Budapest Parkban
hu.longDescription:
Moby nyílt légi koncert a Budapest Parkban. Kapunyitás 18:00, jegyek a budapestpark.hu oldalon.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/index.php/en/events/moby-20260801

es.title: Moby en directo en Budapest Park
es.shortDescription: Moby vuelve el 1 de agosto de 2026 — puertas 18:00.
es.longDescription:
Concierto al aire libre en Budapest Park. Entradas en budapestpark.hu.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/index.php/en/events/moby-20260801

it.title: Moby live al Budapest Park
it.shortDescription: Moby torna il 1 agosto 2026 — aperture porte 18:00.
it.longDescription:
Concerto all'aperto al Budapest Park. Biglietti su budapestpark.hu.

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/index.php/en/events/moby-20260801

he.title: מובי בבודפשט פארק
he.longDescription:

Sources: https://www.budapestpark.hu/index.php/en/events/moby-20260801

document.title: Sting 3.0 — MVM Dome
document.shortDescription: Sting brings the STING 3.0 tour to Budapest on Thursday 18 June 2026 with Dominic Miller and Chris Maas — special guest Dea Matrona.
document.longDescription:
The STING 3.0 European tour stops at MVM Dome on Thursday 18 June 2026. The lineup is a tight three-piece with Dominic Miller and Chris Maas; Dea Matrona is listed as special guest. Tickets via Live Nation Hungary.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026

hu.title: Sting 3.0 — MVM Dome
hu.shortDescription: Sting a STING 3.0 turnén 2026. június 18-án az MVM Dome-ban.
hu.longDescription:
A STING 3.0 európai turné budapesti állomása 2026. június 18-án. Vendég: Dea Matrona. Jegyek: livenation.hu.

Sources: https://www.livenation.hu/en/tickets/sting-3-0-budapest-events-edp1623026
